title: Random Game Rules
description: Random Game Rules changes a random game rule every X seconds
body:
![An image of the Random Game Rules logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a00d2664195ae5d90a31cec26f8e5e475d6c36ca.png)
 

## Random Game Rules is a mod that changes a game rule every X seconds 
 
## Settings:

![a minecraft command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78999b2835ddee7f0d2a3fca59996aeb7a601767.png)

With game rule randomGameRule you can change if the mod should be on or not. This is by default true.
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
![a minecraft command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a090f3c601448d829bce2f69ee11dcff7d131ba.png)

With game rule randomGameRuleSeconds you can change how many seconds it is between each game rule change. This is by default 120.
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
![a minecraft command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88139912d0db5b1899cdaf37c109fcf6eb2c932e.png)
![a timer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d0b48d1bb6fbefd26b8a4b5de8e03d2e19d7b1.png)

With game rule randomGameRuleTimer you can change if a timer showing how long it is until the next game rule chage should be visible. This is by default true.
_________________________________________________________________________________________________
 ![a minecraft command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9819656f9f958f0f6de6a5df1aed204794520f76.png)

With game rule randomGameRuleTileDrops you can change if the game rule doTileDrops should have a chance of being changed by the mod. This is by default false.
